answer:
To determine the better buy, calculate the price per ounce for each can:

- **First can**: \( \frac{57 \text{ cents}}{7.5 \text{ oz}} = 7.6 \text{ cents/oz} \)
- **Second can**: \( \frac{64 \text{ cents}}{8.25 \text{ oz}} \approx 7.76 \text{ cents/oz} \)

The first can is cheaper per ounce, so the correct answer is:

\boxed{B}
